title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Eishin Flash...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Look, they have Umamusume plushies as prizes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look in the direction Eishin Flash is pointing and
see a claw machine filled with Umamusume
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is a glaring absence of detail, but the cute
features on them are rather endearing.
choice_data_list: Do you want to give the game a try?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No. There is a large obstacle to winning this
game, and that is the machine itself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Despite the necessity of precise operation down
to the millimeter in order to win a prize, the
control system is very inaccurate.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Worse, the claw's flawed design makes grasping
objects incredibly inefficient. Such conditions are
grossly unfair.
choice_data_list: I'll give it a shot instead, then!
I'll give it a shot instead, then!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You do seem rather confident. Very well, I entrust
you with this endeavor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
